content: The Ebbinghaus forgetting curve demonstrates that memory retention decays exponentially over time without reinforcement. The formula R(t) = e^(−t/S) models this decay where S represents memory stability.
Vector databases like ChromaDB enable semantic search by storing high-dimensional embeddings. Cosine similarity measures the angle between embedding vectors, not their magnitude.
My grandmother's lasagna recipe uses bechamel sauce with nutmeg, layered with slow-cooked bolognese and fresh pasta sheets. The key is resting the assembled dish for 30 minutes before baking.
TypeScript's type system supports structural subtyping, meaning types are compatible if they have the same shape regardless of nominal declarations. This differs from Java's nominal type system.
Paris travel notes: The Musée d'Orsay is best visited on Thursday evenings when it stays open until 9:45pm and crowds thin. Café de Flore for breakfast, avoid tourist lunch traps near Notre-Dame.
React's useCallback hook memoizes a function so it maintains referential equality across renders. Use it when passing callbacks to optimized child components to prevent unnecessary re-renders.
HTTP/2 multiplexing allows multiple requests and responses to be in flight simultaneously over a single TCP connection, eliminating head-of-line blocking from HTTP/1.1.
The CAP theorem states that distributed systems can only guarantee two of three properties simultaneously: Consistency, Availability, and Partition tolerance.
